description.unified: Deals Magic DMG to a random enemy 5times. Each hit stuns the target for [0.6sec->0.5sec], and restores Mana by 100 when landing a Critical Hit. Non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to [1.4%->7%] of ATK per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to enemies in the target area and stuns them for [1.2sec->1sec]. Non-hero enemies take plus additional Magic DMG equal to [7.8%->40%] of ATK per [Ember] stack.
Deals Magic DMG to all enemies 5times. This attack applies [150%->160%] increased Critical DMG, and non-hero enemies take additional Magic DMG equal to [2.3%->10%] of ATK per [Ember] stack.

On hit, applies a stack of [Ember] to the target. When attacking a target at max stacks, restores Mana by 30. [Ember]: Deals Magic Damage over Time every 1sec for 20sec, and stacks up to [12->10] times.

light.unified: When hitting an enemy with 10 or more [Ember] stacks, Magic DMG taken increases by [40%->20%] for [10 sec->5 sec].
Each [Ember] stack increases the target’s Magic DMG taken by [1% (added)].

dark.unified: Every 10 sec, stuns enemies with [Ember] for [1.2 sec->1 sec]. If the target has 10 or more [Ember] stacks, stuns for [1.8 sec->1.5 sec] instead.

description.unified: [Fireball] Reduces Mana Cost by [1->1000] and increases DMG by {0}%.

[Fire Rain] Increases DMG by [20% (added)]. Upon Critical Hit on an enemy with 5 or more stacks of Ember, Cooldown will be reduced by [{0}% (added)]. Upon killing an enemy with this Skill, Cooldown will be reduced by an additional [20%->5%].
[Flame Diffusion] Changes Ember max stacks to [14 (added)] and increases Ember DMG by {0}%.

dark.unified: [Ember] becomes non-dispellable, and applies 1 [Ember] stack every second to all non-hero enemies.

description.unified: Critical Rate increases by [{0} (added)], Critical DMG increases by [{1} (added)], and Skill Attacks deal additional DMG equal to [{2}% (added)] per [Ember] stack on the target.
